permissions_setup.method: Isolated user_preferences.json was edited to reflect Settings > Scripting permissions because onboarding/sign-in prevented reliable manual UI toggling in the headless app.

visual_inspection_failures_or_blockers: 025 enabled tab create initial attempt: blocked by active-window focus conflict while xterm had focus; retry 026 succeeded and visually proved two tabs.
029 inside-Warp app ping initial attempt: blocked by stale zombie discovery record causing ambiguous_instance.
030 inside-Warp app ping after cleanup: log succeeded, but screenshot did not clearly prove fresh output; repeated as 031 with visible success.

command_attempts.name: metadata__instance_list
command_attempts.permission_state: outside-Warp control disabled in discovered instance record
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Use a staggered desktop with an external xterm running warpctrl on the left and the target Warp window/workspace visible on the right; this shows both command/output and any UI effect or lack of effect.
command_attempts.expected_result: JSON list contains discoverable Warp instance with outside_warp_control_enabled false
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned JSON instance list for pid 6523 with endpoint null and outside_warp_control_enabled false.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Terminal shows JSON instance discovery and target Warp is visible.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Screenshot shows external terminal output next to Warp workspace; discovered instance is disabled for outside-Warp control.

command_attempts.name: default-off__instance_inspect
command_attempts.permission_state: outside-Warp control disabled
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Use a staggered desktop with an external xterm running warpctrl on the left and the target Warp window/workspace visible on the right; this shows both command/output and any UI effect or lack of effect.
command_attempts.expected_result: Command should be denied with local_control_disabled and the visible Warp workspace should not change.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "local_control_disabled"}}.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Denied command output visible; target Warp workspace remains unchanged.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Screenshot shows denial JSON in xterm and no visible target state mutation in Warp.

command_attempts.name: enabled__instance_list
command_attempts.permission_state: LocalControlAllowOutsideWarp and metadata/app-state preferences enabled by isolated preferences file
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Use a staggered desktop with an external xterm running warpctrl on the left and the target Warp window/workspace visible on the right; this shows both command/output and any UI effect or lack of effect.
command_attempts.expected_result: Command should list discoverable instances after enabling permissions.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned JSON instance list; stale zombie record still appeared alongside/around the enabled instance and later caused ambiguous-selection retries.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Terminal shows instance-list JSON and Warp remains visible.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Screenshot/log show discovery output; stale disabled zombie discovery record was still present.

command_attempts.name: enabled__instance_inspect
command_attempts.permission_state: outside-Warp control enabled, but stale zombie discovery record present
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Use a staggered desktop with an external xterm running warpctrl on the left and the target Warp window/workspace visible on the right; this shows both command/output and any UI effect or lack of effect.
command_attempts.expected_result: Command should target the active enabled instance or request explicit instance disambiguation.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned ambiguous_instance: multiple local Warp control instances were discovered; pass --instance.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Terminal should show success for metadata read or a clear selector error; target Warp remains visible.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Terminal showed ambiguous_instance because a stale zombie discovery record remained.
visual_inspection.unexpected_ui_changes_or_ambiguity: Stale zombie instance record from an earlier crashed/defunct Warp process masked active instance selection.

command_attempts.blocker_reason: stale zombie discovery record caused ambiguous_instance; explicit --instance targeting used for final validation.

command_attempts.name: enabled__tab_create_initial_missing_target
command_attempts.permission_state: outside-Warp app-state mutations enabled; explicit instance selected; xterm had focus
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Use a staggered desktop with an external xterm running warpctrl on the left and the target Warp window/workspace visible on the right; this shows both command/output and any UI effect or lack of effect.
command_attempts.expected_result: Command should create a new tab in the active Warp window.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned missing_target: tab.create requires an active Warp window.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Before and after should prove a new tab appears.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: After screenshot showed the JSON missing_target error and no new tab.
visual_inspection.unexpected_ui_changes_or_ambiguity: The external terminal held OS focus, so the active Warp window selector could not resolve.

command_attempts.blocker_reason: active-window focus conflict in staggered outside-Warp layout; command was retried while focusing Warp during execution.

command_attempts.name: enabled__tab_create_focus_warp
command_attempts.permission_state: outside-Warp app-state mutations enabled; explicit instance selected; Warp window focused while command ran
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Use a before/after staggered composition; focus Warp during command execution so active-window selection resolves, then capture terminal output and tab strip together.
command_attempts.expected_result: Command should create a new visible terminal tab.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned created true with previous_count 1 and count 2.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: After screenshot should show the command output and a second tab in the Warp tab strip.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: After screenshot shows created=true JSON in xterm and two bash tabs visible in the Warp tab strip.

visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Screenshot shows denial JSON and no warpctrl-validation output appeared in the visible Warp terminal.

command_attempts.name: inside_warp__app_ping_initial
command_attempts.permission_state: inside-Warp terminal; stale zombie discovery record still present
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Run the command inside a visible Warp terminal and capture the terminal output in the Warp UI.
command_attempts.expected_result: Record current implemented behavior or expected execution-context denial.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command returned ambiguous_instance before stale record cleanup, so it did not prove inside-Warp behavior.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Warp terminal should show the command and either denial or current implemented result.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Screenshot showed ambiguous_instance from stale discovery, not a meaningful inside-Warp behavior result.
visual_inspection.unexpected_ui_changes_or_ambiguity: Stale discovery record masked the inside-Warp behavior.

command_attempts.blocker_reason: stale zombie discovery record caused ambiguous_instance; stale record was moved into logs/stale_local_control_records and the check was repeated.

command_attempts.name: inside_warp__app_ping_after_stale_cleanup
command_attempts.permission_state: inside-Warp terminal after moving stale zombie record out of active discovery path
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Run the command inside a visible Warp terminal after stale cleanup and capture the full desktop.
command_attempts.expected_result: Record current implemented behavior or expected execution-context denial.
command_attempts.actual_result: Command log returned ok true for app.ping, but the screenshot did not clearly show the fresh command output, so a clearer repeat was captured as 031.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Warp terminal should visibly show the command output.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Log shows success, but screenshot remained ambiguous because it did not clearly display the fresh success output.
visual_inspection.unexpected_ui_changes_or_ambiguity: Screenshot did not clearly prove the successful inside-Warp result.

command_attempts.blocker_reason: visual proof was ambiguous; repeated as 031 with clearer visible command output.

command_attempts.name: inside_warp__app_ping_visible
command_attempts.permission_state: inside-Warp terminal after stale zombie cleanup; WARPCTRL exported in the visible Warp shell
command_attempts.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
command_attempts.proof_setup_answer: Run from a visible Warp terminal with the command and JSON output readable; keep external xterm staggered as additional context.
command_attempts.expected_result: Record current implemented behavior or expected execution-context denial.
command_attempts.actual_result: Current implemented behavior: command returned ok true for app.ping with the selected instance_id.

visual_inspection.expected_visual_effect: Warp terminal should show the inside-Warp command and JSON result.
visual_inspection.observed_visual_effect: Screenshot shows the Warp terminal containing app.ping success JSON and EXIT_CODE: 0; external xterm remains visible beside it.

notes: Apt package installation ended with a libc-bin post-install ldconfig.real error, but required X11 tools were available and used.
Several defunct warp-oss processes left a stale discovery record. It was archived under logs/stale_local_control_records before final inside-Warp current-behavior validation.

Outside-Warp commands that rely on an active Warp window can fail in a staggered screenshot layout if the xterm owns focus; the successful tab.create retry focused Warp during execution while preserving combined before/after screenshots.
